testName: SCA can create a lexical skill with multiple components
errorPattern: Timed out retrying: cy.wait(@getIsAuthorizedOwnerAction) - No request ever occurred.

fix.summary: getIsAuthorizedOwnerAction lives on the accounts GraphQL service, not content. Register the intercept on the correct service so the alias actually fires.
fix.pattern: In beforeEach, add cy.interceptGQLQuery('getIsAuthorizedOwnerAction', 'accounts') alongside the other ops. For lists of ops, branch on op === 'getIsAuthorizedOwnerAction' to use 'accounts'; everything else stays on 'content' (mirrors the forEach pattern already in commands.js / supporting specs).

investigationFindings: Spec comments explicitly call out: 'Setup all GraphQL intercepts - FIXED: Added missing getIsAuthorizedOwnerAction'. interceptGQLQuery in cypress/support/commands.js routes POSTs based on the second arg (content | accounts | reports). When this op is registered against content the intercept never matches the accounts endpoint, so no @alias ever exists for cy.wait to resolve.
rootCauseChain: NETWORK_ISSUE -> wait on @getIsAuthorizedOwnerAction -> intercept registered on wrong service -> alias never fires -> timeout
